reference: I am seventy-six years of age. I feel good when I get up in the morning—usually about three:zero AM. Every other day, I work out at Planet Fitness for about an hour and ten minutes. I use the treadmill for twenty-five minutes at four miles per hour and a four% incline. The rest of the time, I exercise my arms, legs, and shoulders. Whether I exercise or not, by noon, I get really tired and my back begins to hurt. I have to sit down and rest a lot. This has been the case for the past six months. I hope there is an exercise that can help me. I do not take any prescription medication. I do take some vitamins.
